name: AI Ki Bhavishyavaani
desc: The Gokuldham members find themselves both anxious and excited about the AI predictions. Will they come true, or are they just a hoax?

name: Champaklal Returns Home
desc: As Champaklal returns to Gokuldham, he shares the unbelievable tale of how he was swept away and captured by Pakistani soldiers. How will the residents react to his extraordinary adventure?

name: Champaklal Is Safe
desc: Champaklal contacts Jethalal via video call to let him know he is safe in Kutch. Will he make it back to Gokuldham without any trouble?

name: Bapuji's Rescue
desc: Bapuji finds himself in a tight spot as the Pakistani soldiers see through his bluff. Can he devise a plan to save himself and the fishermen?

name: Bapuji's Bluff
desc: After being caught by Pakistani soldiers, Bapuji convinces them he's one of their spies. Will they see through his bluff or believe his story?

name: Bapuji Pakde Gaye
desc: Bapuji gets captured by Pakistani soldiers and interrogated. What will Bapuji say to escape this situation?

name: Bapuji in Trouble
desc: Bapuji is apprehended by the Pakistani army, who mistake him for an Indian spy. What actions will they take against him?

name: Pakistani Jasoos
desc: As Bapuji floats towards Pakistan, fishermen spot him and mistakenly think he's a Pakistani spy, alerting the authorities. Will they uncover the truth?

name: Maa Ka Abhaas
desc: Sunder's mother senses that Champaklal might leave the country, while the Gokuldham members work to figure out the situation. Meanwhile, Inspector Pandey receives orders to locate Champaklal urgently.

name: Bapuji Kaha Hai?
desc: As Bapuji floats further away, the colony members lose sight of him. How will they manage to find him and get him down safely?

name: Bapuji Ko Kaise Utaare?
desc: The colony members panic as they struggle to figure out how to bring Bapuji down. With Inspector Pandey stepping in, can they find a way?

name: Bapuji's Balloon Adventure
desc: Bapuji drifts across the city, carried by balloons, as the colony members race to catch up and figure out how to bring him back down. Will they manage to rescue him?

name: Bapuji Ki Udaan
desc: Bapuji gets the opportunity to release the balloon to kick-start the New Year, but things take an unexpected turn when he ends up floating away with the balloons. Will the others manage to bring him down in time?

name: Ek Nayi Shuruaat
desc: Everyone in Gokuldham Colony celebrates and welcomes the New Year with great excitement and festive spirit.

name: Secret Surprise
desc: The Gokuldham members ring in the New Year with great enthusiasm and excitement. Meanwhile, each of them secretly prepares unique balloon surprises for the celebration.

name: Gokuldham New Year Celebration
desc: In Gokuldham, everyone gets ready to welcome the New Year with elaborate celebrations and great enthusiasm.

name: Bapuji's Future
desc: While Popatlal eagerly shares everyone's future, he hesitates when it comes to Bapuji. What could he be hiding?

name: Sabki Bhavishyavaani
desc: Popatlal uses artificial intelligence to predict everyone's future and reads them out one by one. What surprises and revelations await them?

name: Popatlal's Huge Announcement
desc: As restlessness grows, Popatlal gears up to reveal his much-awaited announcement in the clubhouse.

name: Rahsyamai Meeting
desc: Everyone is eager about Popatlal's huge announcement that will either shake or break their world.

name: Popatlal's Suspense
desc: Popatlal keeps the Gokuldham men in suspense about his plans. Meanwhile, a father and son visit Gada Electronics to purchase a phone.

name: Chotelal Ki Bhavishyavaani
desc: Chotelal, disguised as an astrologer, advises Bhide to stop worrying about Sonu's marriage now, in an attempt to help Sonu escape the situation. Will Bhide be convinced?

name: Mission Shaadi Atkao
desc: Tapu and Sonu convince the actor to help them in this situation. Will their plan work out?

name: Tapu And Sonu Hire An Actor
desc: Tapu and Sonu come up with a plan to hire an actor to help them avoid getting married. But will their plan work?

name: Tapu's Wedding Woes
desc: Tapu is growing increasingly anxious as the pressure to get married mounts, but he's running out of creative excuses to dodge the issue. Will he find a clever way to wriggle out of it?

name: Shaadi Ka Darr
desc: As their families begin the search for suitable life partners, Sonu and Tapu find themselves in a state of panic. Desperate to avoid arranged marriages, will they be able to come up with a plan?

name: Shaadi Pressure
desc: Jethalal and Champaklal attempt to persuade Tappu to consider marriage, but he firmly refuses. Meanwhile, Sonu faces similar pressure from her parents. How will the duo manage to decline their elders' expectations?

name: Suitable Groom For Sonu
desc: Bhide calls in an acquaintance to help arrange Sonu's marriage. How will she react when she finds out?

name: Bhide Ki Jaldbaazi
desc: Worried about Sonu and Tapu's growing friendship, Bhide decides to speed up his search for a groom for Sonu. Meanwhile, Bapuji starts looking for a bride for Tapu.

name: Shaadi Ki Umr
desc: Bhide is concerned about Sonu's friendship with Tapu, fearing it might blossom into love. How will he come to terms with the fact that his daughter is now grown up and capable of making her own decisions?

name: Sonu Ki Chinta
desc: Bhide’s concern for Sonu grows as he struggles with his distrust of Tapu and his desire to find her a suitable match quickly. How will he handle the pressure of having a growing daughter?

name: Sonu Runs Late
desc: Bhide is on edge, worried that Sonu and Tapu Sena haven't returned from the party. He decides to take matters into his own hands and heads out to check on them.

name: Baccho Ka Bhavishya
desc: Bhide and the others grow anxious about their children's future and upcoming marriage proposals. Later, Bhide becomes particularly concerned when he finds Sonu's phone switched off.

name: Permission To Party
desc: Jethalal grows increasingly worried about his son's future now that he’s grown up. Meanwhile, Tapu Sena seeks Bhide’s permission to let Sonu attend a late-night party.

name: Sodhi Confesses
desc: Anjali’s plan succeeds, and Sodhi finally admits to his wife about his party-sharty and how the men of the colony made up an excuse to protect him. How will she respond?

name: Anjali Ki Dosti
desc: Anjali learns the truth about how the men of the colony lied to Roshan Bhabhi to save Sodhi after his party-sharty. Will she expose their lies?

name: Taarak Ka Idea
desc: The men of Gokuldham rally together to help Bhide and Popatlal manage a drunken Sodhi. They turn to Taarak, hoping he can come up with a plan to get Sodhi safely back to Gokuldham. What solution will Taarak devise?

name: Bhide Seeks Jethalal's Help
desc: Bhide and Popatlal turn to Jethalal for help in managing a drunken Sodhi. Just as Jethalal is about to leave home, Champaklal catches him. Will this land Jethalal in trouble?

name: Sodhi Ki Party-Sharty
desc: Popatlal and Bhide manage a drunken Sodhi, while Roshan anxiously waits at home. Will Sodhi be allowed into the house?

name: Cheers Or Not?
desc: Harmeet tries to trick Sodhi into drinking, but Popatlal and Bhide make sure to keep him in check. Will Harmeet succeed in getting Sodhi tipsy during his birthday celebrations?

name: Harmeet’s Party
desc: Sodhi brings Bhide and Popatlal along for Harmeet’s birthday to ensure he doesn’t drink. But will the two manage to resist temptation themselves?

name: No Party Sharty
desc: Roshan hesitates to give Sodhi permission for his party, but his friends promise he will behave. Will she agree?

name: Paratha Party
desc: Roshan refuses to allow Sodhi to throw a party for his friends visiting from out of town and suggests a paratha party instead.

name: Sodhi's Party Plans
desc: Sodhi is overjoyed about his friend's visit from Punjab for his birthday. Will Roshan give him the green light for a celebration?

name: Dunkiwala Ka Fraud
desc: Upon discovering that Babu Bakkal is actually Dunkiwala, Jethalal flees from his men, taking the money with him. Will he get caught?

name: Dunkiwala Ke Saath Meeting
desc: Jethalal and his friends arrange a meeting with Dunkiwala, hoping to catch him red-handed. Will their plan succeed?

name: Dunkiwala Ko Kaise Pakde?
desc: Jethalal and his neighbours are increasingly worried as they struggle to trace Dunkiwala, the businessman who deceived Jethalal. Will they find a way to catch him?

name: Jethalal Ke Saath Fraud
desc: Jethalal goes to the police station to file a complaint against the businessman who scammed him. Will Inspector Pandey be able to help him?

name: What To Do With The Fridges?
desc: Jethalal is concerned about the fridges lying around in the colony with no sign of anyone coming to collect them. What explanation will the businessman give when Jethalal calls him?

name: Macchar Problem
desc: Baagha struggles with the mosquito problem as he and Nattu Kaka look after the fridges overnight, waiting for them to be transferred.

name: Jethalal Ki Duvidha
desc: Jethalal finds himself in a dilemma with old fridges cluttering his shop just as a new shipment of fridges is about to arrive. How will he handle the situation?

name: Jethalal Ki Khushi
desc: Jethalal successfully acquires all the fridges and is overjoyed. Later, a businessman arrives at Gada Electronics to finalize the deal. How will this transaction unfold?

name: Mega Exchange Offer
desc: Jethalal's social media campaign quickly gains traction, attracting a lot of attention. His tempting offer seems too good to be true and other businessmen start to wonder what the catch is.

name: Cooling King Ka Offer
desc: Jethalal faces difficulty finding old fridges in scrap shops and comes up with an exchange offer to acquire Cooling King brand fridges.

name: Jethalal Ke Liye Sunahara Mauka
desc: After successfully delivering the fridge to the businessman, Jethalal is presented with an enticing offer to acquire more old fridges of the same brand for a generous reward.

name: Fridge Ka Sauda
desc: Bhide unknowingly strikes a deal to sell his fridge to a scrap dealer for a shockingly low price. Just in time, Jethalal steps in to stop the sale and tries to help Bhide secure a much better offer. Will Jethalal’s intervention save the day?

name: Bhide's Fridge Repair
desc: Jethalal gets frustrated with Bagha because Bawri keeps visiting the shop repeatedly. Later, Bagha heads to Bhide's house to repair his fridge.

name: Morning Chai
desc: Gokuldham Colony faces a crisis as the milk supply runs dry, leaving everyone without their beloved morning chai. Later, Bhide struggles to decide whether to repair his fridge or replace it.

name: Dairy Strike
desc: The milkmen’s strike leaves the colony struggling to get their basic daily supplies. How will the residents manage without milk?

name: Fun At The Old Age Home
desc: While Tapu Sena and Bapuji bond with the senior citizens at the old age home, Jethalal and his friends grow increasingly worried. Will they be able to find out where they’ve gone?

name: Old Is Gold
desc: Bapuji surprises Tapu Sena with a secret trip, building their excitement to a peak. But how will they react when they discover the destination is an old age home?

name: Surprise Trip
desc: Feeling restless in Gokuldham, Tapu Sena decides it’s time for an exciting getaway. Bapuji, noticing their eagerness, hints at the perfect destination where they’re sure to have a blast but keeps the location a secret.

name: Jethalal Ki Exercise
desc: Champaklal encourages Jethalal to work out at home. Meanwhile, Bagha and Nattu Kaka devise a plan to attract more customers to the shop.

name: Life After Diwali
desc: The excitement of Diwali fades, leaving the colony members feeling empty. As they try to fill the void, they begin to look for new adventures and challenges to take on.

name: Allrounder Patakha's Final Test
desc: The Gokuldham members are thrilled about the Allrounder Patakha and hold a lucky draw to decide who will get to light it. But will it go off with a bang, or turn out to be a dud?

name: Patakha Panic
desc: Jethalal’s convinced that Allrounder Patakha is going to flop, and he’s worried about losing everything. Is he overthinking it, or is there something to his fear?

name: Allrounder Patakha
desc: Jethalal acquires a super firecracker and can’t wait to show it off to the colony members. Will this firecracker live up to the hype, or will it fizzle out?

name: Free Patakhe
desc: Tapu Sena suggests a collective purchase of firecrackers for everyone in the colony. But will the colony members be on board with this plan?

name: Sarees For Mahila Mandal
desc: Champaklal invites the Mahila Mandal to his home and gifts them sarees for Diwali. Meanwhile, the men of Gokuldham gather at Abdul's shop. Later, Bhide makes an announcement about distributing free firecrackers to all society members.

name: Diwali Ki Taiyyari
desc: With enthusiasm high, the colony members make grand arrangements for Diwali. But will the festivities go smoothly?

name: Bade Guruji Ka Parda Faash
desc: Varun and his father seek Bade Guruji's blessings in separate encounters. Will they uncover Taarak's elaborate scheme?

name: Boss Aur Guruji Ki Meeting
desc: Taarak finally manages to dress up Popatlal as Bade Guruji, preparing him to meet Varun, the boss’s son. Will Taarak’s elaborate plan succeed, or will they get caught?

name: Guruji's Double Trouble
desc: Taarak and his friends are stumped on how to arrange a meeting between Varun, his boss, and Bade Guruji, especially since Varun is already acquainted with Bapuji. Can they find a fake Bade Guruji in time to pull off the charade?

name: Bade Guruji Ke Saath Mulaqat
desc: Taarak worries whether Bapuji will make it in time to pose as Bade Guruji for Varun. Will everything go smoothly with their pretend meeting?

name: Taarak Ki Chinta
desc: Champaklal is irritated with Jethalal for agreeing to Taarak’s request and decides not to take on the role of Bade Guruji. How will Taarak handle this setback?

name: Bapuji Ko Kaise Manaye?
desc: Taarak worries about how to get Bapuji to play the role of Bade Guruji for his boss. Can he convince him to go along with it?

name: Bade Guruji Se Mulaqat
desc: Taarak’s boss insists that he organise a meeting with Bade Guruji. Will he manage to make it happen?

name: Taarak Ko Ho Rahi Tension
desc: Taarak is anxious, fearing his boss's reaction if it's revealed that the whole office was on break. Could this cost him his job?

name: Boss Se Chutkara
desc: Taarak is pleased to have time off from work due to his boss's absence. However, the other employees are now demanding the same. Will Taarak grant their request?

name: Taarak's Day Off
desc: Taarak is excited to learn that his boss will be on leave for two days, prompting him to plan some quality time with Anjali. Will his plans go smoothly?

name: Japan Ki Special Strawberry
desc: Anjali invites Jethalal and Champaklal over for a strawberry milkshake. Later, Taarak's boss inquires about his Bade Guruji, putting Taarak in a tricky situation.

name: Ravan Dahan In Gokuldham
desc: The colony members are excited to get back to their festivities and dance Garba. Will the celebrations continue without any trouble until Raavan Dahan?

name: Saving Danav's Life
desc: Danav's wife rushes in to inform the colony members that Danav is in danger. What has happened to him, and will the colony members decide to help?

name: Danav's Revenge
desc: Everyone in Gokuldham is thrilled about the Navratri celebrations, but Danav is determined to take revenge and ruin their festivities. Will he succeed in his plans?

name: Danav Ki Dhamki
desc: Danav dares the Gokuldham colony members to finish the decorations, saying he’ll only help if they apologize. How will the colony members handle this situation?

name: Danav Ki Complaint
desc: The ladies of Gokuldham go to the police station to file a complaint against Danav, who beats his wife at home. Will Inspector Pandey be able to help with this situation?

name: Dushman Ka Dushman Dost Hota Hain
desc: Bhide attempts to contact other decorators, but they all refuse due to the society's conflict with Danav. Later, Popatlal introduces a new decorator named Raka Tabla. Will he step in to assist the members with the Navratri decorations?

name: Mahila Mandal Ki Meeting
desc: Decorations for the event in Gokuldham are underway. Meanwhile, the Mahila Mandal calls for an urgent meeting involving all society members. What could be the pressing issue behind this sudden gathering?

name: Confronting Danav
desc: The Mahila Mandal visits Danav’s home and offers support to his wife. Later, they confront Danav directly. What will be the result of their bold stand?

name: Navratri Decorations
desc: Tapu Sena contacts the mandap decorator, but he refuses the job. Undeterred, they reach out to another decorator. Will they succeed in managing the wedding arrangements without Bhide's guidance?

name: Bhide Falls Sick
desc: The colony members are excited about Navratri celebrations and decide to start planning the decorations. But with Bhide falling sick suddenly, who will take up the charge?

name: Garba Practice
desc: Gokuldham colony is abuzz with Navratri excitement. As the community comes together to perfect their Garba steps, but will the celebrations unfold smoothly, or will unexpected twists and turns add a dash of drama to the festivities?

name: Celebrity At Gada Electronics
desc: Jethalal, Nattu Kaka, and Bagha eagerly await the arrival of a special celebrity at Gada Electronics. Who is the celebrity?

name: Gada Electronics Ki Nayi Scheme
desc: Jethalal meets with Nattu Kaka and Bagha to discuss new ideas for increasing sales at Gada Electronics. Will they come up with a plan?"

name: Discount Dilemma
desc: Jethalal struggles to sell his electronics as online markets and malls, with their enticing discounts, continue to dominate the market. Will he be able to find a solution to overcome these challenges?

name: Sarva Pitru Amavasya
desc: The entire colony comes together to prepare traditional food and make elaborate arrangements for the Sarva Pitru Amavasya ritual, a sacred ceremony to honour and pay respect to beloved ancestors.

name: Paiso Ka Bandobast
desc: The colony members are overjoyed when Tapu Sena reveals that the funds have been secured. But how did they miraculously come up with the money?

name: Gokuldham Society Ki Badnaami
desc: The colony members are torn about how to address the scholarship situation, and they're considering being transparent about what really happened. Will they muster the courage to come clean?

name: Bappa Se Prarthana
desc: Abdul informs the society members that Rita Reporter is arriving in the colony with her cameramen. With Vicky still withholding the funds, Bhide and the other members are left wondering how they will manage to handle the situation.

name: Vicky Ki Marzi
desc: The colony members are left stunned and shocked, unsure of how to proceed, after Vicky refuses to make the payment and bluntly tells them that he has changed his mind.
